title: ActionInventoryItem
description: A single action an agent can propose.

action_name.description: Unique name of the action this agent can propose.

tool_name.description: The tool through which this action is executed.

authority_required.description: Whether this action requires explicit authority to be granted before execution.

review_required.description: Whether this action requires human review before execution.

reliance_required.description: Whether execution of this action creates a reliance record.

default_posture.description: The default posture for this action (e.g., allowed, blocked, requires_approval).

control_status.description: Whether controls for this action are implemented, partial, planned, or not applicable.
